x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Deposit / Transfer Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Money is transferred from another account.

Comment:
Examples: Salary deposit, Online transfer, Wire transfer, Interbank transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Deposit Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Physical cash is deposited into the account.

Comment:
Examples: ATM cash deposit, Over-the-counter deposit

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rewards / Points Crediting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Reward points are credited to a loyalty account.

Comment:
Examples: Credit card reward points, Promotional bonus points

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Crediting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Bank credits interest earned on deposits.

Comment:
Examples: Savings account interest (monthly/quarterly), Fixed deposit interest at maturity

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback Crediting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback earned from card spending is added.

Comment:
Examples: Monthly credit card cashback, Debit card cashback

x-enumeration-literals.name: Refund / Reversal Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Money returned from a cancelled transaction.

Comment:
Examples: Purchase refund, Fee reversal, Chargeback

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Disbursement Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Loan amount credited to customers account.

Comment:
Examples: Personal loan disbursement, Mortgage disbursement

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend / Investment Income Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Investment earnings credited to account.

Comment:
Examples: Mutual fund dividends, Bond coupon payments

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Manual correction by the bank.

Comment
Examples: Error correction, Compensation credit
